notes.content: Between the Fall 2025 and Fall 2027 application cycles, the School of Social Sciences, Humanities and Arts will not require transfer students to complete major specific selection criteria to be admitted to this major*. Students wanting to enroll in this major will be admitted using UC Merced's general transfer requirements**. * This only applies to certain SSHA majors. ** The General Transfer Requirements are as f ol lows: Units and GPA Complete 60 semester (90 quarter) units of UC-transferable college credit Earn a minimum grade point average of 2.40 (nonresident: 2.80) in UC-transferable courses Take no more than 14 semester (21 quarter) units as Pass/Not Pass Course Requirements/Subject Requirements Complete the following seven-course pattern, earning a grade of C- or better in each course: Two transferable English composition courses One transferable mathematical concepts and quantitative reasoning course that has a published prerequisite of intermediate algebra Four transferable courses chosen from at least two of the following areas: Arts and Humanities, Behavioral and Social Sciences, Biological and Physical Sciences While major courses are not required for admissions, it is highly recommended to complete as many of the recommended major preparatory courses as possible before transferring to ensure timely progress to degree. Any major courses not completed prior to enrollment at UC Merced must be completed upon enrollment at UC Merced to ensure time to degree and graduation. Recommended, but not Required Prior to Transfer: PSY 001 PSY 010 Complete additional Lower Division Major Core course: PSY 015 Complete one introductory course chosen from the following list: COGS 001 or ECON 001 or PH 001 or POLI 001 or SOC 001 or ANTH 001 Courses in the major emphasis must be taken for a letter grade, and may not be taken on a pass/no pass basis unless the course is offered only on a pass/no pass basis. AP Exam Score & Course Exemptions An AP Psychology score of 4 or 5 exempts PSY 001 An AP Statistics score of 4 exempts PSY 010 An AP Economics: Macroeconomics And Microeconomics score of 4 or 5 exempts ECON 001 An AP Government and Politics: United States score of 4 or 5 exempts POLI 001 UC Merced Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) credit policies are detailed in the link below: A dvance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) Examinations Please read the catalog page for more information about the Psychology, Health Psychology Emphasis major. For more questions about admissions, please email: transfer@ucmerced.edu .
notes.contentHtml:
Between the Fall 2025 and Fall 2027 application cycles, the School of Social Sciences, Humanities and Arts

will not require transfer students to complete major specific selection criteria to be admitted to this major*.

Students wanting to enroll in this major will be admitted using UC Merced's general transfer requirements**.


* This only applies to certain SSHA majors.

** The General Transfer Requirements are as follows:


Units and GPA

  • Complete 60 semester (90 quarter) units of UC-transferable college credit
  • Earn a minimum grade point average of 2.40 (nonresident: 2.80) in UC-transferable courses
  • Take no more than 14 semester (21 quarter) units as Pass/Not Pass


Course Requirements/Subject Requirements

Complete the following seven-course pattern, earning a grade of C- or better in each course:

  • Two transferable English composition courses
  • One transferable mathematical concepts and quantitative reasoning course that has a published prerequisite of intermediate algebra
  • Four transferable courses chosen from at least two of the following areas: Arts and Humanities, Behavioral and Social Sciences, Biological and Physical Sciences


While major courses are not required for admissions, it is highly recommended to complete as many of the recommended major preparatory courses as possible before transferring to ensure timely progress to degree. Any major courses not completed prior to enrollment at UC Merced must be completed upon enrollment at UC Merced to ensure time to degree and graduation.

Recommended, but not Required Prior to Transfer:

  • PSY 001
  • PSY 010
  • Complete additional Lower Division Major Core course: PSY 015
  • Complete one introductory course chosen from the following list: COGS 001 or ECON 001 or PH 001 or POLI 001 or SOC 001 or ANTH 001


Courses in the major emphasis must be taken for a letter grade, and may not be taken on a pass/no pass basis unless the course is offered only on a pass/no pass basis.


AP Exam Score & Course Exemptions

  • An AP Psychology score of 4 or 5 exempts PSY 001
  • An AP Statistics score of 4 exempts PSY 010
  • An AP Economics: Macroeconomics And Microeconomics score of 4 or 5 exempts ECON 001
  • An AP Government and Politics: United States score of 4 or 5 exempts POLI 001


UC Merced Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) credit policies are detailed in the link below:

Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) Examinations


Please read the catalog page for more information about the Psychology, Health Psychology Emphasis major.


For more questions about admissions, please email: transfer@ucmerced.edu.
